name: Crystal Cave Sort
description: Crystal Cave Sort is a relaxing yet brain-teasing gem sorting puzzle set in a magical glowing crystal cave! Pour colorful gemstones between crystal tunnels until each contains only one gem type. 200 levels across 8 cave worlds with ruby, sapphire, emerald, amethyst and more. Unlock tunnel themes, earn gem coins, and chase 3-star ratings. Easy, Medium & Hard difficulty with full progress saving!
instructions: Tap a crystal tunnel to select it then tap another to pour gems Match colors until every tunnel holds only one gem type to win
